hausa.claim_daily_essence_bonus: Karɓi Ƙarin Asali na Yau da Kullum
hausa.daily_bonus_ready: Ƙarin yau da kullum yana shirye!
hausa.essence_scales_with_how_many_source_to: Asali yana ƙaruwa gwargwadon yawan kayan-tushen da ka yi atisaye da su.
hausa.welcome_future_sage: Barka da zuwa, Mai hikima na gaba!
hausa.sage_spells_unlock_when_you_make_progr: Sihirin Mai hikima yana buɗewa sa’ad da ka ci gaba a wasu kayan STEM Lab — Mai bincike sararin samaniya, Dakin Lissafi, RoadReady da sauransu. Kowane sihiri iyawa ce ta atisaye-tunawa — kana furta shi ta hanyar amsa tambaya daga fannin wannan kayan aiki.
hausa.scroll_down_to_yet_to_discover_and_cli: Gungura ƙasa zuwa «Har yanzu ba a gano ba» sannan danna maɓallin
hausa.button_that_ll_take_you_to_the_tool_th: na kowane sihiri. Zai kai ka ga kayan aikin da yake buɗe shi.
hausa.allobot_is_watching_your_progress_ever: AlloBot yana kallon ci gaban ka a ko’ina. Aiki, matsala ko atisaye guda ɗaya a wani kayan aiki zai fara buɗe sihiri a nan.
hausa.open_study_hall_untimed_practice_mode: Buɗe Zauren Karatu — yanayin atisaye ba tare da lokaci ba
hausa.untimed_drill_no_damage_full_explanati: Atisaye ba tare da lokaci ba · Babu lahani · Cikakken bayani
hausa.ai_scaffolds_while_learner_does_most_o: AI yana ba da tallafi yayin da mai koyo ke yin galibin aikin tunani. Koyo na gaske + tsaro mai ma’ana.
hausa.real_learning_happens_with_ai_assist_t: Koyo na gaske yana faruwa da taimakon AI. Musanya tana daidai.
hausa.some_learning_some_risk_watch_for_over: Ɗan koyo, ɗan haɗari. Yi hankali da dogaro fiye da kima a hankali.
hausa.high_error_cost_low_learner_effort_ai_: Babban tsadar kuskure + ƙarancin ƙoƙarin mai koyo + AI a cikin madauki = sakamako da ke kama da daidai amma ba mai ɗorewa a aikace ba.
hausa.ai_doing_all_the_work_learner_gets_ans: AI yana yin dukkan aiki. Mai koyo yana samun amsoshi amma ba fahimta ba. Ƙwarewa tana raguwa ko ba ta taɓa girma ba.
hausa.ai_workload_inquiry_who_is_doing_the_t: 🔬 Binciken Nauyin Aikin AI — Wa ke tunani?
hausa.set_ai_assistance_level_learner_effort: Saita matakin taimakon AI, ƙoƙarin mai koyo, sabon aiki da tsadar kuskure. Ƙiyasta yanayin koyo. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa.
hausa.your_hypothesis_when_does_ai_assist_he: Zaton ka (Yaushe taimakon AI ke taimakawa maimakon cutarwa? A ina za a ja layi?)
hausa.e_g_on_high_novelty_tasks_ai_is_a_brai: misali, a ayyuka masu sabon abu AI abokin tunani ne; a aiki na yau da kullum yana gajarta ƙwarewa...
hausa.ai_assist_learner_effort_sums_to_100_w: Taimakon AI + ƙoƙarin mai koyo jimla > 100 — taimako fiye da kima yana yin me da ribar koyo?
hausa.why_does_novelty_matter_for_both_learn: Me ya sa sabon abu ke da muhimmanci ga koyo da haɗari duka?
hausa.when_is_ai_doing_90_of_the_work_actual: Yaushe AI yin 90% na aiki shawara ce mai kyau da gaske? (Alama: ƙaramar tsadar kuskure, ƙarancin sabon abu, samarwa mai matsin lokaci.)
hausa.how_would_you_design_a_class_where_ai_: Ta yaya za ka tsara aji inda aka yarda da AI amma koyo ba ya gajarcewa?
hausa.i_can_explain_why_this_ai_effort_novel: Zan iya bayyana dalilin da ya sa wannan haɗin AI/ƙoƙari/sabon abu/tsada ke ba da wannan yanayin.
hausa.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Na’urar bincike — babu maki, babu bayyanawa, babu amsa da ake bayarwa. «Ribar koyo» ƙiyasi ne; auna na gaske yana buƙatar tantancewa kafin/bayan, ayyukan canja wuri da gwaje-gwajen tunawa. Tasirin taimakon AI ya bambanta bisa fanni (ƙirƙira da fasaha da tunani).
hausa.equip_up_to_3_spells_you_can_only_cast: Shirya har sihiri 3. A wannan balaguro za ka iya furta sihirin da aka shirya kawai.
hausa.pick_what_fits_today_you_can_change_th: Zaɓi abin da ya dace yau. Za ka iya canja wannan a kowane balaguro. Wahala mai yawa = babbar ƙarin asali.
hausa.no_presets_yet_build_a_loadout_you_lik: Babu saiti tukuna. Gina kayan aikin da kake so, sannan danna «Ajiye na yanzu» don adana su na gaba.
hausa.static_questions_never_run_out_gemini_: Tambayoyi tsayayyu ba sa ƙarewa — Gemini yana ƙirƙirar sababbi nan take.
hausa.ai_generated_questions_can_be_wrong_ev: ⚠️ Tambayoyin da AI ya ƙirƙira na iya zama kuskure (har amsar da aka yiwa alama) — idan wani abu ya yi kama da baƙon abu faɗa wa malaminka.
hausa.research_specific_goals_improve_perfor: Bincike: takamaiman manufofi suna inganta aiki + mai da hankali. Zaɓi kowanne.
hausa.rewards_fast_correct_retrieval: Yana ba da lada ga tunawa mai sauri + daidai
hausa.use_all_3_equipped_spells: Yi amfani da dukkan sihiri 3 da aka shirya
hausa.rewards_versatility_not_one_trick: Yana ba da lada ga fasaha iri-iri, ba dabara ɗaya ba
hausa.finish_run_without_dying: Kammala tsere ba tare da mutuwa ba
hausa.rewards_strategy_healing_choices: Yana ba da lada ga dabara + zaɓin warkarwa
hausa.interrupt_a_boss_special: Katse dabara ta musamman ta shugaba
hausa.crit_during_the_winding_phase: Yi mai muhimmanci a lokacin shirye-shirye
hausa.land_a_critical_cast_correct_under_6_s: Cimma furuci mai muhimmanci (daidai + ƙasa da daƙiƙa 6) don katsewa da rage lahani.
hausa.calibrated_you_said_you_knew_it_and_yo: 🎯 An daidaita: ka ce ka sani — kuma ka sani.
hausa.overconfident_felt_sure_but_missed_wor: ⚠ Amincewa fiye da kima: ka ji tabbaci amma ka rasa. Ya cancanci duba na biyu a Zauren Karatu.
hausa.lucky_guess_but_maybe_you_knew_more_th: 🎁 Zaton sa’a — amma watakila ka sani fiye da yadda kake tunani!
hausa.self_aware_you_flagged_the_doubt_and_t: 🎯 Sanin kai: ka nuna shakka, kuma shakka ta yi daidai. Ƙara zuwa duba.
hausa.ai_generated_question_the_marked_answe: Tambaya da AI ya ƙirƙira — amsar da aka yiwa alama na iya zama kuskure. Idan ta yi kama da baƙon abu faɗa wa malami.
hausa.use_all_3_equipped_spells_2: Yi amfani da dukkan sihiri 3 da aka shirya
hausa.finish_without_dying: Kammala ba tare da mutuwa ba
hausa.interrupt_a_boss_special_2: Katse dabara ta musamman ta shugaba
hausa.accuracy_by_stated_confidence_well_cal: Daidaito bisa amincewar da aka bayyana; sanduna da aka daidaita da kyau suna hawa daga «zato» zuwa «na sani».
hausa.recommended_next_steps: Matakan da aka ba da shawara na gaba
hausa.re_study_what_you_got_wrong_mark_got_i: Sake nazarin abin da ka kuskura. Idan ka fahimta yiwa alama «Na gane yanzu».
hausa.overconfidence_detected: An gano amincewa fiye da kima
hausa.what_is_one_thing_you_learned_or_notic: Wane abu ɗaya ka koya ko ka lura a wannan tsere? (Rubutu yana ƙarfafa ƙwaƙwalwa fiye da tunani.)
hausa.e_g_the_bee_flower_question_keeps_trip: misali, «Tambayar ƙudan zuma/fure tana ci gaba da rikita ni — juna = duka biyu suna cin gajiya»
hausa.spend_essence_to_deepen_the_runes_of_e: Kashe asali don zurfafa alamun kowane sihiri. Matakin sama = babban lahanin tushe + manyan buguwa masu muhimmanci.
hausa.no_spells_to_upgrade_yet_unlock_spells: Babu sihiri da za a inganta tukuna. Buɗe sihiri ta wasa wasu kayan STEM Lab.
hausa.untimed_practice_no_hp_no_damage_just_: Atisaye ba tare da lokaci ba. Babu HP. Babu lahani. Tunawa + bayani kawai. Tambayoyin da ka kuskura suna dawowa da wuri.
hausa.no_spells_unlocked_yet_play_other_stem: Babu sihiri da aka buɗe tukuna. Wasa wasu kayan STEM Lab don buɗe sihiri, sannan koma nan don atisaye.
hausa.no_questions_in_the_review_queue_eithe: Babu tambayoyi a jerin duba. Ko dai ba ka yi wasa isashe ba ko kana yin kyau ƙwarai. Gwada Zauren Karatu don atisaye mai ƙaramin haɗari ko fara balaguro.
hausa.question: ❓ Tambaya
hausa.why_this_is_correct: ✓ Me ya sa wannan daidai ne
hausa.still_tough_keep_in_queue: Har yanzu mai wuya — riƙe a jere
hausa.cast_each_spell_at_least_3_times_to_se: Furta kowane sihiri aƙalla sau 3 don ganin ƙarfin ka mafi kyau.
hausa.no_weak_spots_flagged_yet_keep_casting: Babu wuraren rauni da aka nuna tukuna. Ci gaba da furtawa!
hausa.when_you_say_you_know_it_and_you_do_th: Sa’ad da ka ce «na sani» kuma da gaske ka sani — wannan shi ne daidaitawa. Rashin daidaituwa (amincewa fiye/ƙasa da kima) shi ne tsadar koyo da ke ɓoye.
hausa.no_reflections_saved_yet_after_each_ex: Babu tunani da aka ajiye tukuna. Bayan kowane balaguro rubuta abu ɗaya da ka lura ko ka koya. Kai na gaba zai gode wa kai na yanzu.
